BatchDeleteEniIp.eniId: The ID of the elastic network interface
BatchDeleteEniIp.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. For details, see [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
BatchDeleteEniIp.privateIpAddresses: The specified private IP address information. IPv4 or IPv6 addresses can be specified, with a maximum of 10 addresses per request
